name: Coeur Mining, Inc.
business: Coeur Mining, Inc. is a precious metals producer with assets in the United States, Canada, and Mexico. The company produces and sells gold and silver from five operating mines: Las Chispas, Palmarejo, Rochester, Kensington, and Wharf. It sells gold and silver bullion to multi-national banks, bullion trading houses, and refiners, and sells gold concentrate to third-party smelters under a long-term offtake agreement.

exposures.sentence: We are primarily a gold and silver producer with operating assets located in the United States and Mexico and an exploration project in Canada.
As a precious metals producer, we have the unique opportunity to supply the raw materials that are essential to economic growth and priorities, including in clean energy and technology sectors.
With the upcoming acquisition of New Gold, our results of operations and cash flows will fluctuate as the prices of copper changes.

catalysts.sentence: The New Gold Transaction is anticipated to close in the first half of 2026, subject to relevant regulatory approvals and routine closing conditions.
Detailed engineering for the replacement crusher has been completed and a new tertiary crushing system is planned to be installed and commissioned during the second quarter of 2026.
However, we are in the process of amending an operating permit at Las Chispas that is set to expire in November 2026, which is expected to support future planned activities.
